flashy.models.parameters package

Submodules

flashy.models.parameters.container module

class flashy.models.parameters.container.ParameterContainer(values=<factory>)

Bases: Struct

Generic base class for configuration-like objects backed by a ParameterDefinition registry.

Each subclass must override DEFINITIONS to describe the available parameters, their defaults, validation rules, and optional conversion logic.

This class provides a unified dictionary-based storage for parameter values, initialized from the registry.

Inherits:

msgspec.Struct

DEFINITIONS: ClassVar[Mapping[str, ParameterDefinition]]

Mapping of parameter keys to their definitions. Must be overridden.

values: dict[str, Any]

Runtime storage of parameter values.

classmethod create_default(**kwargs)

Create a new instance using default values defined in DEFINITIONS.

Each parameter is initialized using the default field of its corresponding ParameterDefinition.

Optional keyword arguments can override default values or provide additional initialization parameters accepted by the class.

Parameters:

kwargs (Any) – Optional overrides for default parameter values or constructor arguments.

Returns:

A new instance of the class initialized with default values.

Return type:

ParameterContainer

get_value(key)

Retrieve the current value of a parameter.

Parameters:

key (str) – Name of the parameter to retrieve.

Returns:

The stored value associated with the given key.

Return type:

Any

Raises:

KeyError – If the key does not exist in values.

get_definition(key)

Retrieve the ParameterDefinition associated with a key.

This gives access to metadata such as default value, validation rules, widget type, and transformation logic.

Parameters:

key (str) – Name of the parameter.

Returns:

The parameter definition object.

Return type:

ParameterDefinition

Raises:

KeyError – If the key is not defined in DEFINITIONS.

set_value(key, raw_value)

Set a parameter value using its associated transformation logic.

The raw input value is passed through the parameter’s transform method (if defined) before being stored.

Parameters:

  • key (str) – Name of the parameter to set.

  • raw_value (Any) – Input value to be transformed and stored.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

Raises:

  • KeyError – If the key is not defined in DEFINITIONS.

  • Exception – If definition.transform doesn’t work.

flashy.models.parameters.definition module

class flashy.models.parameters.definition.ParameterDefinition(key, name, description, path, value_type, default, widget_type, valid_range=None, step=None, choices=None, parser=None, validator=None, hardware_name=None, hardware_converter=None)

Bases: Struct

Immutable metadata container describing a single configurable parameter.

This object defines how a parameter behaves in the system, including: default values, validation rules, UI representation, and optional hardware-specific mappings.

Inherits:

msgspec.Struct

key: str

Unique key identifying the parameter.

name: str

Human-readable parameter name.

description: str

Detailed description of the parameter and its behavior.

path: str

Logical grouping used for UI or organization.

value_type: type

Python type used to cast the parameter value after parsing/validation.

default: Any

Default value used when no override is provided.

widget_type: Literal['entry', 'combobox', 'checkbox', 'readonly']

UI widget type used to represent this parameter. Supported values: "entry", "combobox".

valid_range: tuple[float, float] | None

Optional valid numeric range as (min, max).

step: int | float | None

Optional step size for numeric UI widgets.

choices: tuple[Any, ...] | None

Optional fixed set of allowed values (for combo-box style widgets).

parser: Callable[[Any], Any] | None

Optional preprocessing function applied before validation.

validator: Callable[[Any, Any], None] | None

Optional validation function. Should raise an exception if the value is invalid.

hardware_name: str | None

Name of the hardware register associated with this parameter.

hardware_converter: Callable[[Any], Any] | None

Optional conversion function applied when sending value to hardware.

transform(value)

Transform a raw input value into a validated, typed parameter value.

The transformation pipeline is:

  1. Apply parser if defined

  2. Validate value using validator if defined

  3. Cast value using value_type

Parameters:

value (Any) – Raw input value to transform.

Returns:

Fully processed and validated parameter value.

Return type:

Any

Raises:

Exception – Any exception raised by parser or validator.

flashy.models.parameters.parsers module

flashy.models.parameters.parsers.parse_equation(value)

Safely evaluate an equation or returns the value.

Parameters:

value (Any) – The value to evaluate.

Raises:

SyntaxError – If the equation is unsafe to parse.

Returns:

The evaluated result or the value.

flashy.models.parameters.registry module

flashy.models.parameters.registry.iter_caen5781_parameters()

Iterate over all Caen’s DT5781 digitizer channel parameters that have a corresponding hardware register name.

Parameters whose hardware_name attribute is None are skipped.

Yields:

Tuples containing the parameter key and its definition.

Return type:

tuple[str, ParameterDefinition]

flashy.models.parameters.registry.convert_to_caen5781_value(definition, value)

Convert a parameter value to the format expected by Caen’s DT5781 digitizer hardware.

If the provided parameter definition specifies a converter function, the converter is applied to the value. Otherwise, the value is returned unchanged.

Parameters:

  • definition (ParameterDefinition) – Parameter definition associated with the value.

  • value (Any) – Value to convert.

Returns:

Converted value suitable for the hardware configuration.

Return type:

Any

flashy.models.parameters.validators module

flashy.models.parameters.validators.validate_combo_box(definition, value)

Validate that the input is one of the allowed choices.

Parameters:

  • definition (ParameterDefinition) – The parameter metadata.

  • value (Any) – Input value.

Raises:

ValueError – If the value is not in the allowed choices.

flashy.models.parameters.validators.validate_valid_range(definition, value)

Validate that the input is within the allowed range.

Parameters:

  • definition (ParameterDefinition) – The parameter metadata.

  • value (Any) – Input value.

Raises:

ValueError – If the value is outside the valid range.

flashy.models.parameters.validators.validate_multiple_of_step(definition, value)

Validate that the input is a multiple of the defined step.

Parameters:

  • definition (ParameterDefinition) – The parameter metadata.

  • value (Any) – Input value.

Raises:

ValueError – If the value is not a multiple of the step.

flashy.models.parameters.validators.validate_range_and_step(definition, value)

Validate both range and step constraints.

Parameters:

  • definition (ParameterDefinition) – The parameter metadata.

  • value (Any) – Input value.

Raises:

ValueError – If the value violates range or step constraints.
